knowledge.content: Standard parking rate is ₹20 per hour for all locations (Anna Nagar, T Nagar, Velachery, Mall Parking). No additional peak-hour surcharges apply at this time.
Minimum booking duration is 1 hour; maximum is 24 hours. No overnight discount is currently offered. Cost = duration (hrs) × ₹20.
Anna Nagar Parking — 2nd Avenue, Anna Nagar, Chennai 600040. 8 total slots (IDs: AN-001 to AN-008). Open 24×7. Nearest landmark: Anna Arch. Good connectivity via MTC bus routes.
T Nagar Parking — Usman Road, T Nagar, Chennai 600017. 6 total slots (IDs: TN-001 to TN-006). Near Pondy Bazaar and Nalli Silks. High weekend demand — book in advance.
Velachery Parking — 100 Feet Road, Velachery, Chennai 600042. 10 total slots (IDs: VL-001 to VL-010) — the largest lot. Near VR Chennai Mall and Phoenix MarketCity.
Mall Parking (Express Avenue) — Dedicated lot at Express Avenue mall, Chennai 600002. Validated parking available for shoppers. Ask at the information desk for validation.
To book: (1) Select a location, (2) Click a free slot on the map grid, (3) Choose duration (1–24h), (4) Click 'Book Slot'. Booking is instant. The slot auto-releases when the timer expires.
Slots can be released at any time before expiry by clicking 'Release Slot' on the Active Bookings panel. Slots auto-release when the duration ends. No partial refunds for early release.
Slot availability is updated in real-time. If a location shows 0 available, all slots are occupied — try another location or wait. The system polls active bookings every 15 seconds.
The Smart Assistant understands natural language. Examples: 'Book parking near mall for 2 hours', 'Show slots at Anna Nagar', 'Find parking in Velachery for 3 hours', 'Release slot AN-001'.
Busiest times: 10 AM–1 PM and 5 PM–8 PM on weekdays. T Nagar is especially busy on Saturdays. Velachery fills up during weekend mall hours. Book early to guarantee a spot.
Payment integration (UPI, debit/credit card) is coming soon. Currently the system calculates and displays the cost; payment is handled at the parking booth.
Slot ID format: <location prefix>-<number>. Anna Nagar: AN-001…AN-008. T Nagar: TN-001…TN-006. Velachery: VL-001…VL-010. You can request a specific slot by ID when booking.
